title: Another B1.7.3 Pack
body:
Changes a couple of blocks while still feeling minecraft-y

- Logs don't have the oak texture on top/bottom. 
- TNT look more like planks. 
- softer sand, modern gravel. 
- emerald-like lapis textures. 
- chests as crates. 
- jack o'lanterns with torches. 
- unique ore patterns (diamond uses original). 
- Doors look more like original blocks. 
- modern mossy cobblestone. 
- larger bricks, pistons are now more plank like, and look more like tables. 
- The bed now looks more like two slabs. 
- Softer wheat textures.

And a few other changes.
